name: FeedOracle
description: DORA Operating System — Compliance evidence infrastructure for regulated financial entities. Provides continuous DORA, MiCA, and AMLR monitoring with cryptographically signed evidence, closed-loop finding management, and audit-ready reporting. Every response ES256K-signed and blockchain-anchored.

supportedInterfaces.description: MCP Streamable HTTP endpoint with 50 compliance tools

skills.name: Compliance Preflight Check
skills.description: Pre-trade compliance check for any token or action. Returns PASS/WARN/BLOCK verdict with MiCA authorization status, peg stability, reserve quality, and custody risk. Covers 105+ stablecoins.
examples: Check if USDT is compliant for EU trading
Run compliance preflight on USDC
Is RLUSD authorized under MiCA?

skills.name: DORA Readiness Assessment
skills.description: Assess DORA compliance readiness across all articles. Returns traffic-light scores (green/amber/red) per domain: ICT risk, incident reporting, resilience testing, third-party risk, information sharing. Includes gap analysis and remediation priorities.
examples: Assess our DORA readiness
What DORA gaps do we have?
Run DORA compliance check for a payment institution

skills.name: Evidence Signing & Anchoring
skills.description: Cryptographically sign any compliance decision with ES256K. Anchor on Polygon and XRPL blockchains. Returns signed evidence bundle with content hash, signature, transaction ID, and independent verification URL.
examples: Sign this compliance decision
Create evidence bundle for our DORA assessment
Anchor this report on blockchain

skills.name: Sanctions & AML Screening
skills.description: Screen against EU, OFAC, and UN sanctions lists (87,000+ names). PEP checks, adverse media screening, KYC bundles, GLEIF entity lookup. Real-time watchlist updates.
examples: Screen 'Acme Corp' against sanctions lists
Is this entity a PEP?
Run AML check on company with LEI 5493001...

skills.name: Stablecoin Risk Intelligence
skills.description: 7-signal risk scoring for 105+ stablecoins. Real-time peg deviation, reserve quality, custody assessment, MiCA authorization status, significant issuer checks, and 30-day peg history.
examples: What is the risk score for USDT?
Show peg deviation history for DAI
Compare USDC vs EURC risk profiles

skills.name: Macro Intelligence
skills.description: Real-time macroeconomic signals from 86 FRED series and ECB indicators. Recession probability, yield curve analysis, inflation tracking, labor market health, and composite risk scores.
examples: What is the current recession probability?
Show macro risk dashboard
ECB rate decision impact analysis

skills.name: BaFin Incident Reporting
skills.description: Generate ITS 2024/1772 compliant BaFin incident reports. 5 mandatory sections, classification engine, timeline generation, and export-ready JSON format for regulatory submission.
examples: Create a BaFin incident report for a ransomware attack
Classify this ICT incident
Generate incident timeline for regulator

skills.name: DORA Contract Analysis
skills.description: Automatically check all 15 mandatory DORA Art. 30 clauses (8 standard + 7 CIF). Red-flag scoring, exit readiness assessment, subcontracting chain analysis, and concentration risk evaluation.
examples: Check this cloud contract against DORA Art. 30
Assess exit readiness for our AWS agreement
Analyze subcontracting chain risks
